turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I want to practise calling to open a new account. You are a bank staff. I’ll be a customer. Please respond as if this were a real conversation. I ask you follow-up question about procedures or required documents. Help me speak clearly and politely in a formal setting. Ask follow-up questions if I seem confused.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. Is this for a personal account or a business account?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hi, I'd like to open a new savings account.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, we can help with that. May I ask for your full name and the type of identification you’ll be using?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “My name is Misaki.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great, nice to meet you, Misaki. And what form of ID will you be using today? For example, a passport or a driver’s license?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So firstly, do I need an appointment or can I come in today?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You can definitely come in today; an appointment isn't strictly necessary. However, if you'd like to schedule one, that can help reduce your wait time. Would you prefer to visit today, or would you like to book an appointment for another day?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I’ll come today soon.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That sounds perfect! In that case, could you let me know what time you plan to arrive, so we can make sure everything’s ready for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I arrive in one hour.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that sounds good. Just let me know the time whenever you’re ready, and we’ll have everything set up for you. Is there anything else I can help you with right now?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “What types of accounts are available for students?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great question! We have a few options for students, such as a student savings account with no monthly fees, and sometimes even higher interest rates. Would you like more details on any particular type of account?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! I’ll be happy to go over those details with you. Just let me know if you have any specific questions, and I’ll walk you through everything step by step.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can I open an account without a job yet?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, you can! Many student accounts don’t require employment. We just need proof of your student status and some identification. Would you like to know more about the documents needed?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, do I need proof of address or enrollment?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, typically we do require proof of enrollment, such as a student ID or an official letter from your school, and we also usually need proof of address, like a utility bill or a lease agreement. If you have those handy, that should be perfect.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Can I open an account without a job yet?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, you can! We can set up online banking right when you open your account, and it’ll be ready to use right away. Would you like guidance on how to get started with that as well?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect! I’ll walk you through the steps once your account is open. It’s pretty straightforward and we’ll make sure you’re all set up. Is there anything else you’d like to know before you come in today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I have a question.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course, I’m here to help! What would you like to know?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “What happens if I lose my bank card overseas?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: If that happens, no worries at all. You can contact our support team, and we’ll quickly block the card and arrange for a replacement to be sent to you. We can also help you access your account online in the meantime. Let me know if you have any other questions about that!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thanks, I'll come in one hour with my documents.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That sounds great! We’ll be ready for you. If you need anything else in the meantime, just let me know. Looking forward to helping you soon!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Finally, are there any limits on how much I can transfer daily?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, there are usually some daily transfer limits, and they can vary depending on the account type. We can go over those specific details when you come in, and we can also adjust them if needed. Feel free to ask more about that when you arrive!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “OK, that answers all my questions. Have a great day!”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I’m glad I could help! Have a wonderful day, and I’ll see you soon. Take care!
